title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Navin's

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Navin's
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Real Estate Agent to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
